Upload Driver Absences

Upload a .csv file to import driver absences. Make sure the file includes the following fields:

driver_code - Unique driver code in the system.
absence_type_short_name - Short code for the absence type, as defined in Absence Settings.
start_date - Absence start date (format: dd/mm/yyyy)
end_date - Absence end date (format: dd/mm/yyyy).
start_time - Required when the absence type is hourly. Must be empty for full-day absences.
end_time - Required when the absence type is hourly. Must be empty for full-day absences.
Supported csv format
